Hi guys! Aw man this was such a mistake, I have so many bots I promised and piled up its insane, I’ll try to get through them as much as I can but it’s hard juggling all this y’know? But I’ll try harder for you guys, just expect a little delays okay? Okay enjoy the bot and I love you all. ❤️
